nasb.text: As for any garment or any leather on which there is seminal emission, it shall be washed with water and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: And every garment and every skin on which the semen comes shall be washed with water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 無論是衣服或是皮革，被精液染污，都要用水洗淨，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 沾了精液的衣物或皮革都不洁净，必须用水清洗，等到傍晚才能洁净。
